name: The Podcast
description:
Ever wanted to have a podcast with Joe Rogan? Or maybe you wanted to have a discussion about mundane things while your character is some kind of robot or discuss about habits of your characters?

There's nothing much to fear down here, as here, you can do anything and everything! (Hopefully)!

This is supposed to be funny and light-hearted, and hopefully allows you to have fun, enjoy yourself or make lore for your characters!
